name: emfont
description: emfont MCP server - Find and apply suitable CJK fonts for your text

tools.name: search_fonts
tools.description: Search for fonts by name, language, category, or tags. Returns a list of matching fonts with their details.

query.description: Search query - can be font name, author, language (Chinese/Japanese/Korean), style, or description

category.description: Filter by category (serif, sans-serif, handwriting, monospace, etc.)

language.description: Target language support (zh-CN, zh-TW, ja, ko)

tools.name: recommend_font
tools.description: Get font recommendations based on use case, mood, or text content. Returns suitable fonts with reasons.

text.description: Sample text or content description to analyze

purpose.description: Purpose of the text (heading, body, logo, quote, etc.)

mood.description: Desired mood or feeling (formal, casual, elegant, playful, modern, traditional, etc.)

tools.name: get_font_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific font including weights, license, author, and usage instructions.

tools.name: generate_implementation
tools.description: Generate ready-to-use HTML/CSS/JS code to implement selected fonts in a webpage.

text.description: The text content to display with the font

resources.name: fonts_list
resources.description: Complete list of all available fonts

resources.name: font_categories
resources.description: Available font categories and their descriptions
